message:
fix: respect no_merge flag in polecat zero-commit check

Polecats auto-closed beads on non-code tasks because the zero-commit
guard in gt done did not check the no_merge flag. When a bead has
no_merge: true (set by Mayor for email, research, API call tasks),
zero commits is expected, not a sign of sleepwalking.

Cherry-picked from PR #2501.

Co-Authored-By: Chris Deal <DreadPirateRobertz@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
